examples: The engine had a broken crankshaft.
Remove chain drive wheel from crankshaft.
Fit chain drive sprocket on the crankshaft.
The cams' curved surfaces compress fuel and release exhaust as they spin, generating 24 combustions for each crankshaft revolution.
The "W12" refers to the 6.3-liter, 500-hp direct-injection engine, with four rows of three cylinders conjoined at the crankshaft.
